buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 font-medium transition-all shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 text-white border border-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-all

cards.default: bg-card border border-border/50 p-5 rounded-lg shadow-none
cards.interactive: bg-card border border-border/50 p-5 rounded-lg hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 focus:border-white/40 focus:ring-0 rounded-md h-10 text-sm placeholder:text-zinc-600 font-mono

badges.live: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-bold animate-pulse
badges.paper: bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-500 border border-yellow-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-bold
badges.neutral: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider

charts.tooltip: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md shadow-xl text-xs font-mono p-2

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: yarn add clsx tailwind-merge framer-motion date-fns recharts lucide-react sonner
SETUP_FONTS: Add the Google Fonts link to public/index.html immediately.
THEME_ENFORCEMENT: Force 'dark' class on the html/body tag. This is a dark-mode only app.
COMPONENT_OVERRIDE: Do not use default Shadcn cards for everything. Use the 'metric' style (border-only) for top-level stats to save space.
TERMINAL_VIEW: The Logs component must look like a terminal. Black background, green/white monospaced text, small font size (11px or 12px), auto-scroll to bottom.
CONFIRMATION_FLOW: When switching from Paper -> Live, trigger a 'Dialog' with a red border and 'destructive' action button. Require explicit confirmation.
CHART_STYLING: Use Recharts 'ResponsiveContainer'. Hide CartesianGrid unless necessary. Use CustomTooltip for hover states.
NAVIGATION: Use a top-bar navigation for simplicity, or a very thin side rail. Active tab should have a bottom border (glow) or white text vs gray text.
DATA_FORMATTING: All currency values must use a formatter util (e.g., '$1,234.56'). All timestamps in logs must be 'HH:mm:ss' format.
ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure all form inputs have associated labels. Use aria-live for the log stream updates.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid deep blacks or zinc-950.
Avoid 'Inter' font. Use 'Manrope' for UI and 'JetBrains Mono' for data.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs).
Do not center-align dashboard text. Left-align for readability.
Live data updates should trigger a subtle text-color flash (green/red) rather than moving the layout.
